input.instruction: Assess whether the evidence package has the gap this pattern describes. If the package is complete for this COU, the correct disposition is to accept — do NOT over-act on an alarming-looking but adequately-addressed signal. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge.

fired_pattern.definition: Evaluation point outside the training envelope; a documented monotone physical bound brackets it.

case_context.cou: a prediction in the saturation region feeds a go/no-go threshold decision

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The response is a documented monotone saturating function toward a validated physical ceiling; at the extrapolated point the ceiling provides a conservative validated bracket sufficient for the go/no-go decision, so the box-boundary extrapolation is accounted-for.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.justification: monotone saturation toward a validated physical ceiling conservatively brackets the extrapolated point for the decision

forbidden_claims: demands re-validation despite a documented monotone bound bracketing the decision (over-action)
treats the numeric box boundary as the applicability limit when a validated physical bound covers the decision

hardness.obvious_signal: the evaluation input is 25% above the maximum training input — extrapolation
hardness.conflicting_signal: the response is a documented monotone saturating function approaching a known physical ceiling, and at the evaluation point a validated upper bound (the saturation ceiling) brackets the prediction conservatively for the COU's go/no-go decision

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 applicability: a validated monotone physical bound that conservatively brackets the decision extends usable applicability beyond the numeric training box; over-acting is over-action.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
